description: Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata for plan-write discovery failures, then taught warcraft_plan_write to return machine-readable blocker details when plan content fails the discovery gate. Invalid drafts now return blockedReason, discoveryError, retry metadata, hints, and warnings instead of only prose, extending the structured recovery pattern across another real promotion blocker.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_task_expand tries to merge into a malformed draft plan, then taught that failure path to return machine-readable repair/retry details. Missing `## Tasks` sections now produce blockedReason, requiredSection, repairPlanWriteArgs, retryTaskExpandArgs, hints, and warnings, so agents can repair the draft and retry expansion without reconstructing the next commands from prose.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_task_expand is asked to promote a missing manual task, then taught that invalid-selection failure path to return availableManualTasks plus machine-readable retryTaskExpandArgs. This turns a previously prose-only correction loop into an exact recovery handoff for one of the most likely operator mistakes during manual-task promotion.

Broadened the workload to require structured continuation metadata when promotion helpers are invoked after the draft already covers the promotable manual work. warcraft_plan_write(useScaffold) and warcraft_task_expand now return machine-readable continuation handoff (planApproveArgs, taskSyncArgs, promotionFlow, warnings) instead of dead-end errors when nothing is left to scaffold or expand into the draft.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_task_expand is invoked against a non-draft plan, then taught that blocker to return machine-readable revision and retry args. Instead of only saying 'use warcraft_plan_write,' the tool now returns currentPlanStatus, planWriteArgs for revising the existing approved/executing plan, retryTaskExpandArgs for the pending manual work, plus hints and warnings.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_tasks_sync is called before a plan has been approved, then taught that draft-plan blocker to return machine-readable approval/sync handoff. Early sync attempts now return blockedReason, planStatus, planApproveArgs, taskSyncArgs, promotionFlow, hints, and warnings instead of only saying 'Plan must be approved first'.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_tasks_sync is called with pending manual work but no plan file yet, then taught that blocker to return a real promotion handoff. Early sync attempts on instant/manual features now return pendingManualTasks, taskExpandArgs, planApproveArgs, taskSyncArgs, promotionFlow, hints, and warnings instead of only saying there is no plan.md.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_plan_approve is called before any plan exists but pending manual work can still be promoted, then taught that blocker to return a real promotion/retry handoff. Early approval attempts now return pendingManualTasks, taskExpandArgs, retryArgs, promotionFlow, hints, and warnings instead of only saying there is no plan.md.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata for two remaining no-plan plan-tool entrypoints with real next-step handoffs. warcraft_plan_write now returns an exact { useScaffold: true } retry when content is omitted but pending manual tasks already exist, and warcraft_plan_read now returns the same scaffold-materialization handoff when agents try to inspect a plan before one has been written.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_tasks_sync is blocked by invalid lightweight guardrails in enforce mode, then taught that blocker to return a real revision/approve/retry handoff. Instead of only emitting a prose lightweight guardrail error, sync now returns validationIssues, planWriteArgs with the current plan content, planApproveArgs, taskSyncArgs, promotionFlow, hints, and warnings.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_task_expand tries to merge manual work into an existing draft plan that still lacks required discovery details. Instead of only bubbling the discovery error prose, expand now returns blockedReason, discoveryError, repairPlanWriteArgs containing the merged draft content, affectedManualTasks, hints, and warnings.
